zh.lifeSummary: Aline Willington Heiress是Baron Nicholas Willington II的女兒，於大約1353年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾維林頓。她和Hugh Finderne至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1394年之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾分德哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Willington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any or all of the places named Willington (Beds, Cheshire, Derbys, Durham, Northumb, Warwicks), but there is little evidence from NE England.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

en.lifeSummary: Aline Willington Heiress was born about 1353, in Willington, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Baron Nicholas Willington II. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Hugh Finderne. She died after 1394, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Findern, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline Willington Heiressは約1353年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアウィリントンでBaron Nicholas Willington IIの娘として生まれた。彼女はHugh Finderneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1394年以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアフィンデルンアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Findern, South Derby: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 핑더 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.Saint Michael's Church, Willington, Sout: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 윌링턴 스트 믹하얼'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Aline Willington Heiress(은)는 대략 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 윌링턴에서 Baron Nicholas Willington II의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh Finderne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 핑더 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Aline Willington Heiress родилась около 1353 г. в местности уиллингтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Baron Nicholas Willington II. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Hugh Finderne. Она умерла после 1394 г. и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, финдирн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
